productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Brown Casual Shoes
description: Indulge in the sporty luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this casual shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and plastic tongue to wear the shoe easily. Upper Full grain leather upper with padded fabric inner lining for comfort Rounded toe for ease of wear Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with the word SPORT in the form of lugs for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
